passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
passwordRequirementsDescription: Your password must be between 8-100 characters and include at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character (e.g., @#$%).
displayNameLength: Display name must be between 2 and 50 characters
displayNameInvalidCharacters: Display name can only contain letters, numbers and underscores
acceptTermsRequired: You must accept the terms to continue
birthDateAge: You must be at least 18 years old
imageUrlInvalid: Must be a valid URL (http:// or https://)
textLength: Message must be between 1 and 1000 characters
maxAgeGreaterThanMinAge: Maximum age must be equal to or greater than minimum age
maxAttendanceGreaterThanMinAttendance: Maximum attendance must be equal to or greater than minimum attendance
confirmUnderstandingRequired: You must confirm that you understand the consequences
